alkylation reagent: alkylated with chloroacetamide in the dark for 30 min.
cleavage agent: set to digest at 47°C for 2 hours.
collision energy: subjected to higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) at 37% activation efficiency.
fragmentation method: subjected to higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) at 37% activation efficiency.
instrument: Full MS1 profile data were acquired on a Q-Exactive hf (Thermo Fisher)...
